characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green cartoon owl with large eyes, a small yellow beak, and simple rounded features.
A stylized 2D cartoon man with brown skin, dark hair, a prominent dark mustache, and a unibrow. He has a slightly grumpy or serious default expression.
characters.wardrobe: A light pink long-sleeved shirt. Later depicted with a bare, highly muscular pink torso.
characters.demeanor: Serious and instructive, later becoming triumphant and exaggerated.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Phone पर time waste करके थक गए? [Tired of wasting time on your phone?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out a relatable bad habit (wasting time on the phone).
- Sets up a problem-solution dynamic immediately.
- Uses casual, conversational Hindi-English mix.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Phone पर time waste करके थक गए?

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: मेरे साथ English बोलना सीखो। [Learn to speak English with me.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the app's core value proposition clearly and directly.
- Establishes the instructor character as a helpful guide.
- Pivots the viewer's attention from mindless scrolling to productive learning.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Interview practice करें? 'Tell me about yourself' का जवाब दो। [Shall we practice for an interview? Answer 'Tell me about yourself'.]
Character B says: 'I am' के साथ अपना profession बताओ। [State your profession with 'I am'.]
Character B says: Perfect! अब customer से बात करो। 'How can I help you?' बोलो। [Perfect! Now talk to a customer. Say 'How can I help you?'.]
Character B says: Confidence के साथ बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है। [Speaking with confidence is very important.]
Character B says: Now, speak the full sentence out loud. [Now, speak the full sentence out loud.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's interactive speaking exercises.
- Focuses on real-world, practical scenarios (job interviews, customer service) relevant to the target audience.
- Shows step-by-step guidance, reinforcing the app's role as a supportive tutor.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
NEW CONCEPT
Speak out loud
Interview practice करें? 'Tell me about yourself' का जवाब दो।
Nicely done!
CONTINUE
'I am' के साथ अपना profession बताओ।
अब customer से बात करो। 'How can I help you?' बोलो।
Amazing!
Confidence के साथ बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है。
Now, speak the full sentence out loud.
+4

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a rewarding, triumphant visual payoff for completing the exercise.
- Reinforces positive emotion and encourages daily practice.
- Displays progress metrics to gamify the learning experience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Perfect lesson!
Your confidence is growing!
Keep practicing daily.
CLAIM REWARD
FLUENCY SCORE 85%
AMAZING 100%
TIME 0:44

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final call-to-action.
- Replaces competitor hype with Supernova's core brand promise (speaking with confidence).
- Directs users to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Speak English with confidence.
Download on the App Store
